call_sequence: UNKNOWN — selector recovery required before any call sequence can be specified
attacker_path_hypothesis.expected_gain: UNKNOWN — depends on selector discovery; upper bound is the full $14.76M token balance if an unauthenticated sweep or withdraw-all path exists
preconditions: At least one public value-moving selector exists (withdraw, redeem, claim, sweep, or migrate)
The selector lacks caller authentication or entitlement validation
The $14.76M token balance is held directly by this contract (not in a child escrow requiring separate unlock)

live_context_required.name: verified_source_and_abi
live_context_required.reason: verified_source is null — the system does not know whether source is available on BSCScan. If verified, the ABI and source reveal all public selectors, access control patterns, proxy shape, and contract type (vault, staking, bridge, distributor, etc.). If unverified, selector recovery from calldata becomes the only path.

live_context_required.command_or_source: curl 'https://api.bscscan.com/api?module=account&action=txlist&address=0xa8acdd81f46633b69acb6ec5c16ee7e00cc8938d&sort=desc&apikey={API_KEY}' | jq '[.result[].input[0:10]] | unique' ; then resolve each 4-byte prefix via https://www.4byte.directory/api/v1/signatures/?hex_signature={selector}
live_context_required.name: selector_recovery_from_calldata
live_context_required.reason: No selectors are present in the brief. Recovering 4-byte selectors from recent transaction calldata is the minimum needed to identify value-moving functions (withdraw, redeem, claim, sweep, migrate, etc.) and determine whether any are callable without privilege.

live_context_required.name: proxy_slot_check
live_context_required.reason: unknown_verification_status combined with high token balance is consistent with a proxy-only verified contract whose implementation is unverified or recently changed. EIP-1967 implementation and admin slots must be read to determine whether a storage mismatch or newly reachable implementation exists.

live_context_required.name: deployer_address_and_funding_trace
live_context_required.reason: deployer_address is empty. Without the deployer, cluster matching against closed projects is impossible and the funding origin is unknown. The deployer may link to a known rug, a closed yield project, or a repeat offender wallet.

live_context_required.name: token_balance_breakdown
live_context_required.reason: The $14.76M is attributed to token holdings but the specific tokens, their quantities, and whether they are stablecoins, bluechip assets, or protocol-native tokens are unknown. Token identity determines whether the balance is real user principal or inflated by a worthless protocol token.

live_context_required.name: recent_transaction_patterns
live_context_required.reason: Transaction patterns reveal whether the contract is actively used (deposits, withdrawals, claims), whether a single privileged caller dominates, and whether any failed transactions around value-moving selectors indicate attempted exploitation or access-control enforcement.

expected_assertions: NOT YET SPECIFIABLE — requires selector and source discovery first
setup: Recover and decode all public selectors from transaction calldata or verified ABI
Identify proxy implementation address if applicable
transaction_sequence: NOT YET SPECIFIABLE — requires live context collection first

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: The brief contains no selectors field and no source excerpt. verified_source is null. No transaction calldata has been decoded.
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: Without at least one confirmed public selector, no exploit path can be constructed. Selector recovery is the hard prerequisite for any further triage step.

source_or_selector_basis.evidence: The token_funded_contract tag is assigned by the chain scanner when a contract is discovered via ERC20 transfer logs, meaning real token value has already been deposited into this address.
source_or_selector_basis.why_it_matters: Confirms that the $14.76M balance is not a scoring artifact — real ERC20 transfers into this contract have been observed on-chain. The funds exist and are at risk if any public withdrawal path exists.

suspected_exploit_families: missing access control on value-moving functions
unauthorized withdrawal, redeem, unstake, claim, or sweep
proxy, implementation, or storage mismatch that exposes live funds
phantom accounting where shares or rewards are created without matching assets
why_this_target_matters: A fresh BSC contract holding ~$14.76M in token value with unknown verification status, no recovered selectors, no deployer trace, and no protocol identity. The token_funded_contract tag indicates it was discovered via ERC20 transfer logs, meaning real assets have already moved into it. The hidden_high_value_contract and audit_hidden_contract tags indicate the contract is not publicly documented or attributed. At this value tier, even a single public value-moving selector without access control would be a critical extraction surface. No exploit hypothesis can be formed yet — all blocking gaps are live-context gaps, not theoretical ones.
